overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a wizard character flying on a broomstick over a dramatic coastal landscape during golden hour. The character explores rocky cliffs, passes a magical stag, flies through a natural rock arch, and approaches a wooden dock structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters approaching rocky shoreline

events.description: approaching the coastline from open water, revealing cliffs and rock formations
beginning ascent from water level toward the cliff top

agents.ego_description: flying on a broomstick over choppy waters toward a distant coastline where a glowing stag stands atop a cliff

notable_agents.action: magical stag with glowing antlers standing on the cliff edge, watching the approaching character

entered.detail: choppy dark water with whitecaps stretching to the horizon
jagged rock formations rising from the sea mist
steep rocky cliffs with green vegetation covering the top
hazy mountains silhouetted against the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character flying low over choppy coastal waters toward a distant shoreline. The camera approaches a rocky cliff face where a magical glowing stag stands prominently on the edge. The environment is wide open with scattered clouds and the character begins ascending toward the cliff top.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside terrain with natural rock arch formation

events.description: ascending rapidly up the cliff face, hugging close to the rock wall
flying through the large natural rock arch eroded through the cliff

agents.ego_description: ascending the cliff face and navigating through a narrow natural rock archway

entered.detail: large stone archway eroded through the cliff by ocean waves
tall isolated rock pillar rising vertically from the ocean
dense evergreen trees and shrubs growing atop the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character flies close to the cliff face, ascending rapidly toward the top. The camera passes dense vegetation on the cliff edge and approaches a dramatic natural rock arch. The character navigates through the archway, revealing a tall sea stack formation in the ocean beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters with golden hour lighting

events.description: sun breaks through clouds creating bright golden glare on the water surface
descending to skim low over the water surface along the coastline

agents.ego_description: flying low over the shimmering water along the coastline with the sun creating a golden path ahead

entered.detail: bright golden light reflecting off the water surface creating a shimmering path
small wooden structure visible on the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the arch, the scene opens into wide coastal waters bathed in golden hour light. The sun creates a brilliant glare on the water as the character descends to skim the surface. The cliff line recedes into the mid-distance while a small dock structure becomes visible on the far shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: weathered wooden dock on rocky coast

events.description: approaching the weathered wooden dock structure built against the rocky coastline
slowing down and descending toward the dock platform

agents.ego_description: flying toward a weathered wooden dock structure built against the rocky shore, preparing to land

entered.detail: small wooden vessel moored near the dock pilings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a weathered wooden dock structure built into the rocky coastline. The sun glare fades as the character slows down, revealing details of the dock platform and a small boat moored nearby. The cliffs now form a distant backdrop as the character prepares to land.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight over a dramatic coastline that transforms from a steep ascent up rocky cliffs into a low-altitude glide toward a secluded harbor. It begins with the character flying low over choppy coastal waters, ascending rapidly toward a rocky cliff face where a glowing magical stag stands on the edge. As the camera climbs past dense vegetation, the path leads directly through a dramatic natural rock arch, revealing a towering sea stack in the ocean beyond. The scene then opens into wide waters bathed in brilliant golden hour light, with the character descending to skim the shimmering surface as the cliffs recede into the distance. Finally, the movement slows as the camera approaches a weathered wooden dock and a moored boat built into the rocky shoreline under the fading sun glare.
